from cadquery import Workplane
import cadquery as cq

# Create the ring band
ring = (
    Workplane("XY")
    .circle(10)  # Outer radius
    .circle(9)   # Inner radius
    .extrude(1.5)  # Ring height
)

# Create the center stone (oval/cushion cut diamond)
center_stone = (
    Workplane("XY")
    .workplane(offset=1.5)
    .ellipse(2.5, 2)
    .workplane(offset=2.5)
    .ellipse(2, 1.6)
    .loft()
    .faces(">Z")
    .workplane()
    .ellipse(2, 1.6)
    .workplane(offset=-1)
    .ellipse(0....
